_comments.AzureWebJobsStorage: Required by Functions runtime. Use 'UseDevelopmentStorage=true' for Azurite.
_comments.STORAGE: Connection string for Table/Blob storage. For local dev with Azurite, use the full connection string, this is publicly known.
_comments.AZURE_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT: Azure AI Document Intelligence endpoint. Free tier: 500 pages/month.
_comments.AZURE_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_KEY: Get from Azure Portal > ai-hackathon-docintel > Keys. Already set in SWA app settings for deployed version.
